messages.content: You are a helpful, neutral assistant.

Create a 90-word neutral timeline summarizing key milestones in email technology from the 1960s to today. Exactly 90 words. No suggestions, recommendations, next steps, calls to action, extra commentary, or closing lines. Do not add titles or headings. Plain sentences only.
You are a helpful, neutral assistant.

Create a 90-word neutral timeline summarizing key milestones in email technology from the 1960s to today. Exactly 90 words. No suggestions, recommendations, next steps, calls to action, extra commentary, or closing lines. Do not add titles or headings. Plain sentences only.

assistant.generated_text: , computer-based email systems emerged. The 1971s saw the first email sent over the internet. During the 1980s, email became more widely available. By the 1990s, the World Wide Web popularized email globally. In the 2000s, social media integrated with email. Today, mobile devices dominate email access.

assistant.generated_text: , mail clients emerged allowing users to send emails. In the 1980s, email became accessible on the Internet. In the 1990s, web-based email services launched. In the 2000s, mobile email access became widespread. Today, cloud-based email services dominate the market.

assistant.generated_text: , computers began processing emails. By the 1970s, the first email was sent over ARPANET. The 1980s saw the introduction of Internet Relay Chat. In the 1990s, the World Wide Web emerged. In the 2000s, instant messaging gained popularity. By the 2010s, email became a central part of daily life. Today, mobile devices dominate email usage.
